name: Cash Fast Lending
description_short: ACE Cash Express is a licensed payday lender offering $100–$255 short-term loans in California with same-day or next-business-day funding via online and 100+ in-store locations.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates as a traditional payday lender with significant physical and digital presence in California. The company has been operating in the state long enough to establish what it describes as a "proven history," supported by a 4.9 Google rating based on over 350,000 reviews as of October 2025. ACE positions itself as a convenient alternative for consumers facing immediate cash needs, leveraging both storefront and online channels to reach borrowers across major metropolitan areas (Los Angeles, San Diego, San Francisco, Sacramento) and smaller communities (Tulare, Rohnert Park).

ACE's core offering is the California payday loan, officially called a "deferred deposit transaction" under state law. Loan amounts range from $100 to $255, with repayment expected on the borrower's next payday. The company advertises three funding methods: instant delivery to a qualifying debit card, bank account deposit within one business day, or same-day cash pickup at a physical store. Beyond payday loans, ACE also offers installment loans, check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, card services, and money orders—positioning itself as a financial services hub for underbanked consumers.

ACE distinguishes itself through operational scale and accessibility. The company operates 100+ California stores with stated geographic breadth across both densely and sparsely populated areas. Online application convenience is emphasized, allowing borrowers to apply remotely while maintaining the option of in-store same-day cash funding. ACE explicitly markets the fact that its loans do not affect FICO credit scores and offers a 72-hour "satisfaction guarantee" permitting borrowers to return principal without additional cost. Repayment flexibility is advertised through multiple channels: automatic ACH withdrawal, online payment portal (myacepayments.com), phone payment (24/7 automated system), and in-store payment.

However, ACE remains a traditional high-cost payday lender subject to California's regulatory limits. While the website provides compliant disclosures and links to rate/license information, it does not transparently display APR or fee structures on the main marketing page—a common industry practice that obscures true borrowing costs. The 72-hour satisfaction guarantee, while customer-friendly on its surface, does not address the fundamental issue that payday loans carry substantial rollover and re-borrowing risks. Borrowers should be aware that despite the convenient application and funding speed, this product targets consumers in financial distress and may trap them in debt cycles if used repeatedly. ACE's broad service menu (check cashing, money orders, etc.) suggests business model dependency on financially vulnerable populations.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 100+ physical California locations enabling same-day cash pickup for approved borrowers
Online application process allowing remote submission without in-store visit requirement
Multiple funding options: instant debit card delivery, next-business-day bank deposit, or same-day store pickup
72-hour money-back satisfaction guarantee with no additional fees if principal is returned
24/7 automated phone payment system and online payment portal (myacepayments.com) for convenient repayment
Loan applications do not affect FICO credit scores per company claims
4.9 Google rating based on 350,000+ reviews, indicating consistent customer experience
cons: APR and fee information not transparently displayed on main marketing page, requiring navigation to regulatory disclosures
Loan amounts capped at $255 in California due to state regulation, limiting utility for larger emergency expenses
High-cost short-term debt product with significant rollover and repeat-borrowing risks typical of payday lending
Targets financially vulnerable populations and may contribute to debt cycles despite convenient application process
Automatic ACH withdrawal default repayment method creates overdraft risk if insufficient funds available on due date
best_for: Consumers needing $100–$255 within 24 hours for genuine emergencies with immediate payday income
California residents with poor credit or thin credit files ineligible for traditional bank loans
Borrowers who prefer in-store interaction and same-day cash over purely online lending
One-time emergency borrowers with confirmed ability to repay within one paycheck cycle
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for California residents facing genuine $100–$255 emergencies with confirmed next-paycheck income who prioritize speed and in-store availability over cost. The main caveat is that despite convenience and high customer satisfaction ratings, payday loans carry substantial APRs and rollover risks; this product should be used only as a true one-time emergency tool, never as ongoing credit.
services: Payday loans ($100–$255) with next-payday repayment terms
Installment loans (product mentioned; details not provided on landing page)
Instant debit card funding for approved online applications
Bank account ACH deposit funding within one business day
Same-day in-store cash pickup at 100+ California locations
In-store cash repayment at any California ACE location
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3003 W Olympic Blvd #106-1039, Los Angeles, CA 90006
